Example use cases Financial modeling Build models "Build a 3-statement financial model for [company/industry]" "Build a 3-statement financial model for [company/industry]" "Create a SaaS metrics model with ARR, churn, and LTV calculations" "Create a SaaS metrics model with ARR, churn, and LTV calculations" "Build an LBO model with debt schedules and returns analysis" "Build an LBO model with debt schedules and returns analysis" "Create a real estate pro forma for a multifamily acquisition" "Create a real estate pro forma for a multifamily acquisition" Forecasting "Build a 12-month revenue forecast using historical trends" "Build a 12-month revenue forecast using historical trends" "Create a headcount capacity plan based on target client count" "Create a headcount capacity plan based on target client count" "Model cash flow projections for the next 3 years" "Model cash flow projections for the next 3 years" Scenario analysis "Add a downside case assuming revenue drops 15%" "Add a downside case assuming revenue drops 15%" "Create base, bull, and bear scenarios with different growth assumptions" "Create base, bull, and bear scenarios with different growth assumptions" "Build a sensitivity table showing IRR across exit multiples and hold periods" "Build a sensitivity table showing IRR across exit multiples and hold periods" Data analysis Insights and trends "What trends stand out in 2025 vs 2024?" "What trends stand out in 2025 vs 2024?" "Identify the top 10 customers by revenue and their growth rates" "Identify the top 10 customers by revenue and their growth rates" "Which product categories are underperforming vs budget?" "Which product categories are underperforming vs budget?" "Which accounts have unusual changes vs prior month?" "Reconcile these two sheets and highlight discrepancies" "Reconcile these two sheets and highlight discrepancies" Categorization "Categorize these transactions into expense types" "Categorize these transactions into expense types" "Tag customer feedback by sentiment and topic" "Tag customer feedback by sentiment and topic" "Score each lead based on likelihood to convert" "Score each lead based on likelihood to convert" Data cleaning Standardize formats "Convert all dates to YYYY-MM-DD format" "Convert all dates to YYYY-MM-DD format" "Standardize phone numbers to +1 (XXX) XXX-XXXX" "Standardize phone numbers to +1 (XXX) XXX-XXXX" "Clean up company names (remove Inc, LLC, Ltd variations)" "Clean up company names (remove Inc, LLC, Ltd variations)" Fix
